cli.exportDsc.hint: Run on the target machine: winget configure -f "{0}"
cli.hash.none: No portable items need a SHA256 (use --all to recompute everything)

cli.help:
OwO! Win Deployer — Windows environment replicator (M1 / CLI)

  windeploy <command> [options]

Commands:
  list                    List all software in the catalog
  plan                    Show the install/installed plan (no changes)
  apply                   Run the installation
  apply-config            Apply configs (VS Code/Git/env…, per applyWhen)
  export                  Capture local configs back into the repo
  ssh-setup [--register]  Generate a local SSH key and apply ssh config
  sync                    git pull → apply configs + show install plan
  save [--message m] [--push]   Commit configs changes (--push to remote)
  doctor                  Health check (PATH duplicates/missing, *_HOME missing, installed but not on PATH)
  validate                Validate catalog.json (CI-friendly; exit code 1 on errors)
  lock                    Capture installed versions to catalog/lock.json (reproducible)
  export-dsc [--out f]    Export as winget configure (DSC) YAML
  inventory [--format csv|json|html] [--out f]   Export the machine's installed-software inventory
  download-only [--out d] Pre-download installers for the selected software only (offline/USB deploy)
  migrate --export <dir> | --import <dir>      Export / restore a migration kit
  hash [--all] [--write]  Download portable installers and compute SHA256 (--write backfills catalog.json)

Options:
  --profile <name>        Use a profile (catalog/profiles/<name>.json)
  --only <id,id>          Only these ids
  --category <category>   Only this category
  --all                   All
  --yes / --silent        Skip confirmation on apply (--silent also disables colored output)
  --locked                Apply versions pinned in lock.json on apply/plan
  --log <file>            Also tee output to a log file (unattended)
  --catalog <path>        Specify catalog.json

Examples:
  windeploy plan  --profile dev
  windeploy apply --profile dev --silent --log deploy.log
  windeploy apply --profile dev --locked
  windeploy doctor
  windeploy validate
  windeploy inventory --format html --out inventory.html
  windeploy export-dsc --profile full --out full.dsc.yaml
  windeploy migrate --export D:\kit
cli.hostProfile.missing: Profile '{0}' specified in hosts.json does not exist
cli.lock.hint: After committing lock.json, other machines can run windeploy apply --locked to reproduce the same versions
cli.lock.notFound: catalog/lock.json not found (run windeploy lock first to generate it)
cli.migrate.exportDone: Migration kit created: {0} (includes configs/, manifest.json, RESTORE.txt)
cli.sync.pullFailed: Pull did not succeed (no remote / conflicts?)
